title: Astralrail Cube
description: This is a magic mod based on Iron's spell  n Spellbooks.
body:
![Mod Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2c98191df8d54ebd00c882fcdc0aef98ac7ce31.png)

This mod adds a new set of armor, tools, and various items to the game, along with a brand-new crafting system.
It introduces a blocking mechanic that can completely negate all incoming damage.
Enhanced health modifications and forced block breaking provide players with a smoother and more immersive gameplay experience.


**Astralrail Cube** is an add-on mod based on Iron‘s Spells ’n Spellbooks,
Its lore is fully built upon the universe of Honkai: Star Rail.

You can craft the mod‘s most foundational item—Path Crystal—from utterly useless Amethyst and Netherite Ingots. Within this crystal flows the purest power of a Path: ⌈The Permanence⌋. In theory, ⌈The Permanence⌋ is existence itself, and can be channeled into all Paths except ⌈The Nihility⌋. But then... does not ⌈The Nihility⌋ itself count as a form of existence?

- _All things resist the void_.
- _All things rush toward the void_.
- _All things return to the void_.
......

我们为游戏添加了一套装备、一套工具与许多物品，并添加了一个新的配方系统
为游戏添加了格挡，完全阻挡所有伤害
更强的血量修改与强制性破坏方块，让玩家拥有更好的游玩体验

- _万物皆抗拒无_
- _万物皆奔向无_
- _万物皆归于无_


If you are not a player from Mainland China, please join the Discord Server: [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/3EmA3KPwbs). I will be online sporadically from 8:00 to 21:00 (Beijing Time).

If you are a player from Mainland China, please add QQ: 1081290449.


_The above content comes from AI translation (including this one)_
